rule: terminal success/reward cannot be visible before the decision that earns it
observations/actions/rewards must be logged in prediction-before-update order
hidden key-door, route, and composition mappings cannot be used during development
CRA and baselines receive the same episode counts, action budgets, and train/eval windows
oracle planner cannot be used for tuning or candidate comparison claims
subgoal labels used for scoring cannot be visible to online policy unless declared as observations
